roa.docketEntryComment: AMENDED Felony Abstract of Judgment - Determinate (CR-290)

/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/X:THE JUDGEMENT IS AFFIRMED, WE NOTE THAT THE ABSTRACT OF JUDGEMENT SHOWS A SIX-YEAR TERM FOR ASSAULT WITH A FIREARM, THE TRIAL COURT STATED IT WOULDDISMISS THAT OFFENSE AT THE TIME OF SENTENCING, MOREOVER, APPELLANT NEVER PLEADED TO THAT OFFENSE, THEREFORE, WE ORDER THE ABSTRACT OF JUDGEMENT AMENDED TO DELETE THE STAYED SENTENCE,/

/AJW/CH1 SP 11Y U/2933,1(C)//X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 979 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,    146SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 1125 DAYS,/ENH:CH1:TYPE 12022,5PC:TI 10Y:CS/ENH:CH2:TYPE 12022,5PC:TI 16M:CS/TEXT:TOTAL 24 YEARS AND 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON/STATES/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/DNA/X:DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION OF $200 ON EACH COUNT, $600 TOTAL,/TEXT/5A/5B/

/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//AMEND:ALLEGATIONS OF 12022,53(D)PC TO 12022,5(A)(1), RE: COUNTS 1&2//DEFT ADV RTS:1, 192(A)PC, A FELONY /DEFT ADV RTS:2, 664,187PC, A FELONY //FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/        /X:ADMITTED ALLEGATIONS 12022,5(A)(1)PC AS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2/TW/
/CAL:RULING ON DISCOVERY HEARING//X:WITNESS LIST IS SUBMITTED BY D,A, TO DEFENSE,/CONTD:11-05-2001 DISCOVERYSTATUS/
/CAL:ISSUE WHETHER A QUORUM OF THE GRAND JURY WHICH RETURNED THE FINDING WASPRESENT DURING THE ENTIRE PROCEEDINGS/CONTD:DISCOVERY HEARING/
/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO RECORD/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
/CAL:MOTION TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA /MO DENIED/TW/CTORD:TRANSCRIPT TO BE PREPARED FOR FILE,/DOP/
/CAL:MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA, FOLLOWING JUDGE MCCARTHY//MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE COUNSEL PC 1050(G)/MO GRTD/DOP/CONT/
/CONTD:FOR HEARING ON MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/
/CAL:TRIAL/X:VOIR DIRE CONTINUES,  SEE MINUTES THIS DATE,/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 14/TRANS 14:12-11-01 FOR TRIAL//DEF:IS ORDERED JASON HOANG TO APPEAR IN DEPARTEMENT 14 ON 12-11-01/
/CAL:MOTION TO DISMISS INDICTMENT-LACK OF SPEEDY TRIAL /CONT/
/X:DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE HAS BEEN MET,/CONTD:HEARING PURSUANT TO PC 995/LD:12-17-2001/
/WD GTW/TWWD:10-16-2001/CO:LAST DAY FOR TRIAL 12-17-2001//CONTD:FURTHER DISCOVERY DISCUSSION AND TO SET/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW//CTORD:GRAND JURY TRANSCRIPT SEALED UNTIL 08-02-2001,/
